items.title: ‘Rich Dad, Poor Dad’ author says ‘pin is near’ on TradFi ‘bubble burst:’ Predicts $750K Bitcoin
items.summary: Author and personal finance educator Robert Kiyosaki says Bitcoin is going to $750,000, but there's a catch.
items.title_cn: 《富爸爸穷爸爸》作者称传统金融“泡沫破裂”在即：预测比特币将达75万美元
items.summary_cn: 个人理财教育家罗伯特·清崎表示比特币将涨至75万美元，但有个前提条件。

items.title: Bhutan offloads an additional $72.3M Bitcoin amid market downturn
items.summary: After the Kingdom of Bhutan's BTC reserve peaked in October 2024, when it held more than 13,000 coins, it has been pared to just 4,400 Bitcoin.
items.title_cn: 不丹在市场低迷期再抛售7230万美元比特币
items.summary_cn: 不丹王国的比特币储备在2024年10月达到顶峰，持有超1.3万枚比特币，现已减持至仅4400枚。

items.title: Bitcoin tests fresh decoupling trade as tech correlation drops to 2018 lows
items.summary: BTC price is vastly outperforming the tech-heavy Nasdaq index amid the US–Iran war, but its risks of crashing toward $51,000 persist.
items.title_cn: 比特币测试新的脱钩交易，与科技股相关性降至2018年以来最低
items.summary_cn: 在美国-伊朗战争期间，比特币价格表现远超科技股为主的纳斯达克指数，但跌向5.1万美元的风险依然存在。

items.title: Bitcoin dips to $72K on hot US PPI inflation hours before Fed FOMC meeting
items.summary: Bitcoin price action fell to week-to-date lows with Bitcoin caught between high US inflation and nerves over Fed policy hints at the day's FOMC meeting.
items.title_cn: 比特币在美联储FOMC会议前因美国PPI通胀数据过热跌至7.2万美元
items.summary_cn: 比特币价格跌至本周低点，因美国高通胀数据与美联储政策暗示的担忧交织。

items.title: Bitcoin stalls at $76K: Key BTC price levels to watch ahead of FOMC
items.summary: Bitcoin price traded at $74,000 as investors braced for Jerome Powell’s post-FOMC speech that could see volatile swings toward key BTC price levels.
items.title_cn: 比特币停滞在7.6万美元：FOMC会议前需关注的关键BTC价格水平
items.summary_cn: 比特币交易价格为7.4万美元，投资者为杰罗姆·鲍威尔FOMC会后讲话做准备，这可能引发向关键BTC价格水平的剧烈波动。

items.title: Ethereum aims to cut bridge times by 98% to 13 seconds with new rule
items.summary: Ethereum’s FCR aims to reduce bridge times by up to 98%, bringing L1-to-L2 and exchange deposits down to 13 seconds without a hard fork.
items.title_cn: 以太坊新规旨在将跨链桥时间缩短98%至13秒
items.summary_cn: 以太坊的FCR旨在将跨链桥时间缩短高达98%，将L1到L2和交易所存款时间降至13秒，无需硬分叉。

items.title: Vitalik Buterin promotes an update simplifying Ethereum node software
items.summary: The blockchain co-founder said the goal is to make the "self-sovereign" method of Ethereum users running their own nodes a user-friendly experience.
items.title_cn: Vitalik Buterin推广简化以太坊节点软件的更新
items.summary_cn: 这位区块链联合创始人表示，目标是让以太坊用户运行自己节点的“自托管”方法成为用户友好的体验。

items.title: Bitmine speeds pace of Ethereum buys, boosting treasury to 4.6M ETH
items.summary: About two-thirds of the company’s tokens are currently staked, generating an estimated $180 million in annualized revenue.

items.title: Crypto Market Structure Bill to Face Key Vote in April and Must Pass by May, Senators Say
items.summary: Sen. Bernie Moreno said if the Clarity Act isn’t passed by May, “digital asset legislation will not pass for the foreseeable future.”

items.title: Difficulty Drop Incoming: Bitcoin Miners Catch a Break While Revenues Stay Ugly

items.title: Report: Kraken Pauses Public Listing Plans, Eyes Better Market Conditions

ai_summary.en:
**🌍 Global Macro & Liquidity**: Macro environment shows mixed signals. BTC Fear & Greed at 26 (Fear) indicates crypto-specific pessimism, while Fed futures show restrictive but stable expectations. Global liquidity shows falling yields (US10Y down 1.05%) and subsiding fear (VIX down 13.78%), suggesting some risk appetite returning. Yen weakness suggests potential risk-on flows. News narrative is bearish with traders slashing rally expectations, though regulatory developments (Crypto Market Structure Bill) could provide future catalysts. Overall: cautious risk-on with crypto-specific headwinds.

**🟠 BTC Strategy (Contract Only)**:
* **Signal**: PROBE
* **Reality Check**: Price rank 14.5/100 shows oversold conditions with RSI at 41.2 (approaching oversold). High long liquidation ($18.36M vs $1.51M short) suggests retail pain, potentially nearing bottom. Funding slightly positive at 0.000024% with OI delta +4.60% shows some positioning. Lower wick exhaustion at 62.1% indicates strong buying at lows. No volume signals or star ratings suggest lack of technical confluence.

**🔷 ETH Strategy**:
* **Signal**: OBSERVE
* **Reality Check**: News shows Ethereum improvements (faster bridges, node simplification) but whale reality contradicts with negative sentiment (-0.1) and massive net outflows (-4.56M ETH, -$77.23M stablecoins). This suggests distribution despite positive news. ADX at 44.3 shows strong downtrend (don't fade). Long liquidation $9.90M vs $6.25M short shows retail pain. Lower wick 47.4% indicates some buying support. 7-day trend (price declining from 2349 to 2201) vs 24H (2186-2269 range) shows structural weakness with minor bounce.
* **Key Metric**: Whale net flow of -4.56M ETH (distribution) overrides positive technical signals.

**🟣 SOL Strategy**:
* **Signal**: PROBE
* **Reality Check**: Positive whale sentiment (0.1) but low confidence (42.9%) with token inflow (+279,944 SOL) but stablecoin outflow (-$58,667). News mirrors BTC/ETH bearishness. ADX 35.5 shows moderate trend. Long liquidation $3.59M vs minimal short ($114k) shows retail pain. Lower wick 42.4% indicates buying support. Price rank 24.6/100 shows oversold. 7-day trend (95.59 to 89.84) vs 24H (88.46-92.04) shows decline with consolidation.
* **Key Metric**: Positive token inflow (+279,944 SOL) suggests accumulation despite bearish news.

**BNB Strategy**:
* **Signal**: WAIT
* **Reality Check**: Price rank 10.3/100 shows extremely oversold with RSI 37.0. Long liquidation $183k vs negligible short shows retail pain. Lower wick 52.3% indicates buying. No whale data available. Funding negative (-0.000199%) with OI delta -4.22% shows bearish positioning. Vol ratio 0.92x shows average volume.

**DOGE Strategy**:
* **Signal**: WAIT
* **Reality Check**: Price rank 9.2/100 shows extremely oversold. Long liquidation $3.59M vs $215k short shows retail pain. Lower wick 67.3% shows strong buying at lows. L/S account ratio 1.52 shows more long accounts but position ratio 0.84 shows larger short positions. Funding negative (-0.000100%) with OI delta +2.16% shows mixed positioning.
ai_summary.zh:
**🌍 全球宏观与流动性**: 宏观环境显示混合信号。BTC恐惧贪婪指数26（恐惧）表明加密货币特定悲观情绪，而美联储期货显示限制性但稳定的预期。全球流动性显示收益率下降（美国10年期国债收益率下降1.05%）和恐惧消退（VIX下降13.78%），表明风险偏好有所回归。日元疲软表明潜在的风险偏好资金流动。新闻叙事看跌，交易员降低反弹预期，但监管发展（加密货币市场结构法案）可能提供未来催化剂。总体：谨慎的风险偏好，加密货币面临特定阻力。

**🟠 BTC策略（仅合约）**:
* **信号**: 试探
* **现实检查**: 价格排名14.5/100显示超卖条件，RSI为41.2（接近超卖）。高多头清算（1836万美元 vs 151万美元空头）表明散户痛苦，可能接近底部。资金费率略为正0.000024%，OI增量+4.60%显示一些持仓。下影线耗尽62.1%表明低点有强劲买盘。无成交量信号或星级评级表明缺乏技术一致性。

**🔷 ETH策略**:
* **信号**: 观察
* **现实检查**: 新闻显示以太坊改进（更快的桥接、节点简化），但鲸鱼现实与负面情绪（-0.1）和巨额净流出（-456万ETH，-7723万美元稳定币）相矛盾。这表明尽管有正面新闻，但存在抛售。ADX为44.3显示强劲下跌趋势（不要逆势）。多头清算990万美元 vs 625万美元空头显示散户痛苦。下影线47.4%表明一些买盘支撑。7天趋势（价格从2349跌至2201）vs 24小时（2186-2269区间）显示结构性疲软伴随小幅反弹。
* **关键指标**: 鲸鱼净流出-456万ETH（抛售）覆盖了正面技术信号。

**🟣 SOL策略**:
* **信号**: 试探
* **现实检查**: 鲸鱼情绪正面（0.1）但信心低（42.9%），代币流入（+279,944 SOL）但稳定币流出（-58,667美元）。新闻反映BTC/ETH看跌情绪。ADX 35.5显示中等趋势。多头清算359万美元 vs 最小空头（11.4万美元）显示散户痛苦。下影线42.4%表明买盘支撑。价格排名24.6/100显示超卖。7天趋势（95.59至89.84）vs 24小时（88.46-92.04）显示下跌伴随盘整。
* **关键指标**: 代币正流入（+279,944 SOL）表明尽管新闻看跌，但存在积累。

**BNB策略**:
* **信号**: 等待
* **现实检查**: 价格排名10.3/100显示极度超卖，RSI 37.0。多头清算18.3万美元 vs 可忽略的空头显示散户痛苦。下影线52.3%表明买盘。无鲸鱼数据可用。资金费率为负（-0.000199%），OI增量-4.22%显示看跌持仓。成交量比率0.92x显示平均成交量。

**DOGE策略**:
* **信号**: 等待
* **现实检查**: 价格排名9.2/100显示极度超卖。多头清算359万美元 vs 21.5万美元空头显示散户痛苦。下影线67.3%显示低点强劲买盘。多空账户比率1.52显示更多多头账户，但持仓比率0.84显示更大空头持仓。资金费率为负（-0.000100%），OI增量+2.16%显示混合持仓。
